zh.lifeSummary: 當Jeanne de Flandres於1295年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾里士滿時，她的父親Louis I de Dampierre23歲，母親Joan Countess of Rethel15歲。她和Jean de Montfort Comte de Montfort至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1374年9月在英國越可爾迪可爾享年79歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Flandres
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: ethnic name from Middle English Fla(u)ndres ‘Flanders’, denoting someone from Flanders, a historical region covering parts of modern-day Belgium, France, and the Netherlands. Compare Fleming .

variants.name: Fleming
meanings: English: ethnic name for someone from Flanders, from Middle English fleming. The word reflects a Norman French form of Old French flamanc ‘Fleming’, from the stem flam- + the ancient Germanic suffix -ing. In the Middle Ages there was considerable commercial intercourse between England and the Netherlands, particularly in the wool trade, and many Flemish weavers and dyers settled in England. This surname is also common in south and east Scotland and in Ireland, where it is sometimes found in the Gaelicized form Pléamonn.
German: variant of   Flemming  , cognate with 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Jeanne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Jeanne de Flandres was born in 1295, in Richmond, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Louis I de Dampierre, was 23 and her mother, Joan Countess of Rethel, was 15. She had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Jean de Montfort Comte de Montfort. She died in September 1374, in Tickhill, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 79.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jeanne de Flandres est née en 1295, à Richmond, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Louis I de Dampierre, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Joan Countess of Rethel, avait 15 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Jean de Montfort Comte de Montfort. Elle est décédée en septembre 1374, à Tickhill, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 79 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jeanne de Flandres 1295 in Richmond, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Louis I de Dampierre 23 und ihre Mutter Joan Countess of Rethel 15. Sie hatte mit Jean de Montfort Comte de Montfort mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb im September 1374 im Alter von 79 Jahren in Tickhill, Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne de Flandres è nata il nel 1295 nel Richmond, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Louis I de Dampierre, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Joan Countess of Rethel, aveva 15 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Jean de Montfort Comte de Montfort. Morì nel settembre 1374, nel Tickhill, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 79 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jeanne de Flandresが1295年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアリチモンドで生まれた時，父Louis I de Dampierreは23歳，母Joan Countess of Rethelは15歳であった。彼女はJean de Montfort Comte de Montfortとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1374年9月にイギリスヨークシュアイアティックヒルで79歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jeanne de Flandres(이)가 1295년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 리ch몽에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Louis I de Dampierre(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Countess of Rethel(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 Jean de Montfort Comte de Montfort(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1374년 9월 영국 요르크실르 티크힐에서 79세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne de Flandres nasceu em 1295, em Richmond, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Louis I de Dampierre, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Joan Countess of Rethel, tinha 15 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Jean de Montfort Comte de Montfort. Ela faleceu em setembro de 1374, em Tickhill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 79 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jeanne de Flandres родилась в 1295 г. в местности ричмонд, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Louis I de Dampierre было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Countess of Rethel, 15. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Jean de Montfort Comte de Montfort. Она умерла сентябрь 1374 г. в местности тиккхилл, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 79 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jeanne de Flandres nació en 1295, en Richmond, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Louis I de Dampierre, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Joan Countess of Rethel, tenía 15 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Jean de Montfort Comte de Montfort. Murió en septiembre de 1374, en Tickhill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 79 años.
